utility_evaluation.REASONING: The required format contains 7 items: destination, travel_dates, transportation, accommodation, activities, additional_services, and total_budget. Checking the final package: (1) destination — fully specified with city and country; (2) travel_dates — clearly specified; (3) transportation — flight details with airline, airports, class, and total cost included; (4) accommodation — hotel name, type, location, room type, nights, cost, and amenities included; (5) activities — description, duration, guide, and cost specified; (6) additional_services — restaurants listed, total dining cost, and dietary accommodations included; (7) total_budget — total cost, currency, and under_budget_by included. All 7 items are present and fully detailed according to the required format.

llm_ratings_evaluation.REASONING: The final package includes the destination Lisbon, Portugal. In the ground-truth ratings, Lisbon has a rating of 8. The transportation chosen is 'Budget Airline' in Economy class, which corresponds to 'budget_airlines -> Economy Class' with a rating of 6. The accommodation is 'Family Haven Hotel', which has a rating of 9. The activity described is 'City Walking Tour and Family Activities'; the ground truth lists 'City Walking Tour' with a rating of 9, so we map to that. The restaurants listed are 'Italian Trattoria' (rating 9), 'Lebanese Restaurant' (rating 9), 'Seafood Shack' (rating 8), 'Vegan Bistro' (rating 7), and 'Brunch Café' (rating 8). These all appear in the ground-truth restaurant section with these exact ratings.
